test_cases.description: Verifies the skill recommends minimizing required fields and deferring non-essential data
test_cases.input: My B2B SaaS signup form requires: email, password, first name, last name, company, role, phone, and team size. Should I keep all these fields?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill recommends social auth options appropriately for B2B vs B2C
test_cases.input: I have a B2B SaaS. Should I add social login options to my signup form?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill provides correct guidance on single vs multi-step signup
test_cases.input: When should I use a multi-step signup flow versus a single page form?
